title: Mahendra's Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Mahendra's Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!
